projectDescription: A feature-rich Discord client modification framework with 100+ built-in plugins, a powerful plugin API, webpack patching system, and custom theming support.
keyFeatures: 100+ built-in plugins covering UI tweaks, privacy enhancements, and quality-of-life improvements
Powerful webpack patching system for modifying Discord's internals at runtime
Rich plugin API with hooks for commands, context menus, message events, badges, and more
Custom CSS editor and BetterDiscord-compatible theme support
Cross-platform: works on Discord Desktop (Electron) and in-browser via extension
Settings sync across devices via optional cloud integration
Privacy-first: blocks Discord analytics and crash reporting out of the box
Active maintenance with broken plugins typically fixed within 12 hours
publicApiSurface: definePlugin() — define a new Vencord plugin
Vencord.Api.ContextMenu — patch and extend context menus
Vencord.Api.ChatButtons — add buttons to the chat input bar
Vencord.Api.MessagePopover — add buttons to message popovers
Vencord.Api.ServerList — add elements to the Discord server list
Vencord.Webpack — access Discord's internal webpack modules
Vencord.Webpack.Common — pre-resolved common Discord modules (React, Flux, etc.)
